title: oenothera boothii subsp. rutila
intro: Oenothera boothii subsp. rutila is a perennial plant species belonging to the evening primrose family, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Oenothera boothii subsp. rutila include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
